title: gnetaceae
intro: Gnetaceae is a family of plants, specifically a small group of coniferous plants that are native to tropical and subtropical regions. Members of the Gnetaceae family are often characterized by their unique, often vine-like growth habits and the presence of pollen cones and ovulate cones. The family Gnetaceae includes three genera: Gnetum, Welwitschia, and Ephedra. These plants have adapted to various environments, from tropical forests to arid deserts, and play important roles in their respective ecosystems.
